{{define "page-main"}}
{{if .Page.Ancestors}}
{{range .Page.Ancestors}}{{if ne .Kind "home"}}{{with .LinkTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.Title}}{{end}}/{{end}}{{end}} {{.Page.Title}}
{{end}}

{{.Page.Title}}

{{with .Page.Description}}

{{.}}

{{end}}
{{rawHTML .Page.ContentHTML}}
{{if .Page.ReadingTime}}
{{.Page.ReadingTime}} min read
{{end}} {{if or .PrevPage .NextPage}}
{{if .PrevPage}} Previous {{with .PrevPage.LinkTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.PrevPage.Title}}{{end}} {{else}}{{end}} {{if .NextPage}} Next {{with .NextPage.LinkTitle}}{{.}}{{else}}{{.NextPage.Title}}{{end}} {{end}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
